name: Build and Run Fraud Detection Engine

on:
  push:
    branches: [ main ]
  workflow_dispatch:

jobs:
  build-and-run:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest

    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v3

      - name: Install gcc flex bison
        run: sudo apt-get install -y gcc flex bison

      - name: Build project
        run: make

      - name: Run with sample data
        run: ./fraud_engine samples/rules.txt samples/transactions.csv

      - name: Test error detection
        run: |
          echo "Testing bad rules file - should show syntax error"
          ./fraud_engine samples/bad_rules.txt samples/transactions.csv || true
